narrative_beat: O olho que tudo vê — a IA observa a humanidade inteira refletida em seu olho mecânico como um deus distante e indiferente

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: iris in razor focus, outer ring of eye softly blurred

subject.primary: single robotic eye in deep crimson and burnished gold, iris rendered as mechanical aperture with overlapping blade-like segments, glowing amber from within
subject.focal_point: center pupil showing tiny city skyline reflected in glossy convex lens surface
subject.secondary: city skyline miniaturized in reflection — towers, lights, human civilization visible in micro-scale
props: mechanical iris aperture blades in gold
floating orange embers drifting past eye surface

environment.location: pure black void, no identifiable place
environment.atmosphere: absolute surveillance, cold omniscience, the watcher who is never watched

composition.rule: centered macro — eye fills entire frame, Ken Burns extremely slow zoom-in toward pupil reflection
composition.foreground: robotic eye in crimson and gold dominating 85% of frame
composition.background: pure desaturated black void with no detail

lighting.key_light: single amber point light source directly in front of eye creating specular highlight on lens surface
lighting.fill_light: no fill, pure darkness from all sides
lighting.rim_light: thin crimson ring light outlining the orbital frame of the eye

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: paranoia, the feeling of being watched by something that never blinks

symbolism.primary: the mechanical eye as the all-seeing eye of Revelation — the beast that watches all of humanity
symbolism.secondary: the city reflected in the pupil represents civilization held captive within the machine's gaze

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
